result.stdout:
Smithy C# Code Generator
Smithy.Cli - Smithy 2.0 to C# code generator

USAGE:
  smithy-cli generate <model.smithy|model.json> [options]

COMMANDS:
  generate     Generate C# code from a Smithy model

ARGUMENTS:
  <model.smithy|model.json>   Path to Smithy IDL or JSON AST file

OPTIONS:
  -o, --output <dir>          Output directory for generated code
  -h, --help                  Show this help message
  -v, --version               Show version information

EXAMPLES:
  smithy-cli generate path/to/model.smithy
  smithy-cli generate path/to/model.smithy --output MyGeneratedCode
